    NetClient
    NetClient.shutdownAndForget()
    Shutdown with a 30 seconds timeout (shutdown(30, TimeUnit.SECONDS)).
    NetClient

    Calls shutdown(Duration).
    NetClient
    NetClient.shutdownAndForget(Duration timeout)
    Initiate the client shutdown sequence.
    NetClient
    NetClient.updateSSLOptionsAndForget(io.vertx.core.net.ClientSSLOptions options)
    Update the client with new SSL options, the update happens if the options object is valid and different from the existing options object.
    NetClient
    NetClient.updateSSLOptionsAndForget(io.vertx.core.net.ClientSSLOptions options, boolean force)
    Update the client with new SSL options, the update happens if the options object is valid and different from the existing options object.
